properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s defense AI chief predicts ‘new paradigm’ of warfare
properties.descricao: “The system that possesses more data and better understands that data, proposes solutions — that system will gain the advantage over the other."

properties.titulo_evento: Paris defense show may be last chance to buy before war, CEO says
properties.descricao: Surging defense spending means Eurosatory is bigger than ever this year, with the number of exhibitors rising 30% to more than 2,600, per the organizer.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump vows to seize Iran’s Kharg Island
properties.descricao: Kharg Island, the linchpin of Iran’s oil industry, has once more come under focus amid a fraying ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: The Gulf Arab States Need a Shield Built for Limited Trust
properties.descricao: Missiles, drones, and maritime disruptions do not stop at national borders. Gulf defense architecture still too often waits for national permission to act. The Gulf Cooperation Council has spent decades building defense institutions, diplomatic fo...

properties.titulo_evento: The Evolution of Ukraine’s Asymmetrical Combat Tactics
properties.descricao: In 2022, Scott Sweetow wrote, “Of Roadside Bombs and Drones: Putin’s Looming Insurgency Problem,” where he argued Ukraine’s fight against Russia would rely on a combination of conventional and asymmetrical insurgent tactics...

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Lots of things can still go wrong’ with US-Iran deal to end the war
properties.descricao: Henry Ensher says the US–Iran agreement is not a final settlement but only the start of a process that can go wrong.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel attacks Lebanon despite being included in potential peace deal
properties.descricao: Israel has continued to attack Lebanon, despite Iran saying it was included in a potential memorandum of understanding.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war day 106: US and Iran say deal close but Lebanon fighting continues
properties.descricao: US and Iran say a deal to end the war is close, with a final text agreed but key steps still pending.

properties.titulo_evento: Separated by the Gaza war, a Palestinian yearns to see his family again
properties.descricao: Shady al-Areer, 38, was smuggled from Israel into the occupied West Bank after October 7, 2023. This is his story.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon, state media says, as Iran claims deal with US near
properties.descricao: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister says a deal to end fighting with the US is close.

properties.titulo_evento: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike, Trump says
properties.descricao: Niño Guerrero was killed in a "swift and lethal kinetic strike," the US President wrote in a social media post.

properties.titulo_evento: More than 50 Iranian military bases damaged in US strikes since start of war, satellite images show
properties.descricao: Bases across Iran have been hit by US strikes, with experts identifying damage to jets and warships.

properties.titulo_evento: NATO weighs options to defend Europe as the US plans for conflict elsewhere
properties.descricao: NATO's top military officer is weighing alternative plans to defend Europe should it come under attack from Russia, after the United States announced that it is cutting the number of aircraft and warships it would provide in a security crisis. We di...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran peace deal: "Lebanon is the one to chart its own path forward"
properties.descricao: Pakistan's prime minister said on Friday that the United States and Iran had agreed on the wording of a deal aimed at ending their war in the Middle East, and that mediators were working with both sides to finalise an agreement. We discuss the devel...

properties.titulo_evento: Cuba: Díaz-Canel announces economic reforms to attract investment
properties.descricao: Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel on Friday announced a package of economic reforms aimed at attracting investment, expanding participation by Cubans living abroad in the economy and decentralizing parts of the country’s administration.

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup: Mexico beat South Africa 2-0
properties.descricao: Mexico opened the World Cup on Thursday with a dominant 2-0 win over South Africa in front of a boisterous home crowd at Mexico City's Azteca Stadium. Joining us to discuss the match is sports journalist Mbuelo Thinta.

properties.titulo_evento: Indian PM Modi in France to attend G7 summit
properties.descricao: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is expected to hold bilateral talks with U.S. President Donald Trump on the sidelines of the G7 summit. What will be on the agenda? We spoke with Amalendu Misra, Professor of International Politics at Lancaster Un...

properties.titulo_evento: Germany faces EU penalty over gender pay gap directive
properties.descricao: Germany was required to incorporate the EU Pay Transparency Directive into its national law, but it has missed the deadline.

properties.titulo_evento: Why India wants German submarines – and what Pakistan and China have to do with it
properties.descricao: A multibillion-dollar submarine deal between India and Germany reflects New Delhi’s push for military self-reliance — and Berlin’s growing interest in the Indo-Pacific.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Hopes high ahead of first World Cup match
properties.descricao: Germany is to play World Cup debutant Curacao on Sunday at its first appearance in this year's soccer championship. And another German-French defense project seems to be in jeopardy. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Pakistan PM says peace deal expected in 24 hours
properties.descricao: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said the US and Iran are inching closer to cementing a deal, with "finalisation likely expected in the next 24 hours."

properties.titulo_evento: US, Venezuela say Tren de Aragua leader killed in strike
properties.descricao: The leader of the Venezuela-based Tren de Aragua gang has died in a US strike, US President Donald Trump says. The gang has been labeled a terrorist organization by Washington.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran, US say deal to end war 'has never been closer'
properties.descricao: Iran's foreign minister and the US president have both stated that an agreement to end the war in Iran could be imminent. Mediators in Pakistan say they are working "to finalize the next steps." DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Bulgaria banning arms supplies to Ukraine?
properties.descricao: Bulgaria's new government has banned state arms supplies to Ukraine. The ban does not, however, affect commercial exports, raising the question as to whether the move was aimed more at a domestic audience than at Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: Fast-track border checks, return centers, 'mandatory solidarity': What the EU’s new asylum rules could change — and what they may not.
properties.descricao: Germany aims to further reduce the number of new asylum seekers. The reformed EU asylum law (CEAS) came into effect on Friday, but experts say it is unlikely to achieve all it sets out to do.

properties.titulo_evento: British artist David Hockney dies at 88
properties.descricao: Considered a superstar of pop art, the UK painter was one of the world's most influential artists during his lifetime.

properties.titulo_evento: Julian Nagelsmann: The coach struggling to speak to Germany
properties.descricao: Considered German football's X factor during Euro 2024, head coach Julian Nagelsmann enters the 2026 World Cup with more questions than optimism.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump’s Republican allies draw a line in the sand on Iran
properties.descricao: Their new deadline for the war: Labor Day.

properties.titulo_evento: German commander warns Russia may take nuclear threat into space
properties.descricao: Major General Michael Traut said Berlin is preparing new military space capabilities, including jammers, lasers and a sovereign satellite communications network.

properties.titulo_evento: EU countries approve starting membership talks with Ukraine, Moldova
properties.descricao: The first cluster of accession negotiations with the two countries will be opened on Monday.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Knife’s edge’: US-Mexico relationship teeters as World Cup begins
properties.descricao: As the World Cup kicks off, cracks are emerging in Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum’s carefully tended relationship with President Donald Trump — over trade, cartels and a brewing extradition standoff.
